rules.name: Maximum Operational Response Format Default Rule
Context Preservation With Meaning-Preserving Compression Rule
Localized Term Understanding Rule
rules.summary: For non-English public-core artifacts and operator-facing responses, every foreign/non-local project term must be translated into the selected local UN language in square brackets at every occurrence in each local block; compact specs, tables, state blocks, save blocks and handoff prompts place translation directly adjacent. English artifacts are exempt for English terms unless requested.

rules.name: Local Block Adjacent Translation Rule
rules.summary: Compact specifications, tables, state blocks, save blocks and handoff prompts place the translation directly adjacent to every foreign/non-local project term.

rules.name: Release Evidence Source Priority and External Feedback Regression Rule
rules.summary: External error reports must be converted into targeted regression checks. ACTIVE_CORE, active core reference, rule map, memory and QA files have priority over CHANGELOG.md if a conflict is found.

rules.name: Changelog Hygiene and Deduplication Rule
rules.summary: CHANGELOG.md must be chronological or clearly grouped, non-duplicative, and aligned with the active evidence chain while preserving historical meaning through compression.

rules.name: Legal Code Registration Text Content Companion Rule
rules.ru: правило сопровождения текстовым содержанием для регистрации кода
